title: Lesson: Whirlwind
description: Seraphina will teach you Whirlwind, a devastating spinning attack that strikes all nearby enemies. This advanced technique requires mastery of chaos in combat. Defeat 3 or more enemies simultaneously on 10 separate occasions to prove your readiness.

steps.description: Defeat 3+ enemies at once on 10 occasions
Speak to Seraphina to learn Whirlwind
